scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @watcher/shared && concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @watcher/server" "npm run dev --workspace @watcher/client"
scripts.dev:client: npm run build --workspace @watcher/shared && npm run dev --workspace @watcher/client
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace @watcher/shared && npm run dev --workspace @watcher/server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @watcher/shared && npm run build --workspace @watcher/server && npm run build --workspace @watcher/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @watcher/shared && npm run build --workspace @watcher/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @watcher/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @watcher/client
